title: Cryptool to host Binance Live AMA with CEO Ron Zabel
content_html:
Cryptool is hosting a Binance Live AMA on 14 September 2024 at 14:00 UTC.

The AMA features CEO Ron Zabel walking through the platform, taking questions from the audience and discussing where Cryptool is going next. There will be an introduction segment, an X questions segment, and live audience questions.

Join via the official Binance Live room, and bring your questions.
author: Cryptool
